insert into aml_internal.tbl_crft_team_dtls (TEAM_ID, EMP_CODE, CATEGORY, JOB_DESC, STATUS_ID)
values (6, 380421, '1', '2', '1');--1row

Insert into AML_INTERNAL.TBL_CRFT_ROLE_DTL
  (ROLE_DT_ID, ROLE_ID, EMPCODE, STATUS_ID)
  (select SEQ_CRF_ROLE_DT_ID.NEXTVAL, t.menu_id, 380421, 1
     from AML_INTERNAL.TBL_CRFT_SUB_MENU_MST t
    where t.menu_id in (12,26)
      and t.menu_id not in (select t.role_id
                              from AML_INTERNAL.TBL_CRFT_ROLE_DTL T
                             where t.empcode = 380421)); --- For Add menu to Testers
